posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #5
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain an application at Local Union #5 in Newburgh on Mondays from 8:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. during the recruitment period, then mail it so it is postmarked by March 1, 2027.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Local Union #5, 1 Scobie Drive, Newburgh, NY
posting.applicationHours: 8:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. every Monday, excluding holidays, during the recruitment period.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or high school equivalency diploma, such as TASC or GED.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must be capable and willing to travel long distances.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must be able to pass a drug test upon offer of employment; the sponsor pays for the test.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or high school equivalency diploma (such as TASC or GED).
Must be physically able to perform the work of a Bricklayer, Mason, and Plasterer apprentice, including working in all types of weather.
Must be capable and willing to travel long distances.
Must be able to adapt to various job conditions, including working at heights and on scaffold, swing, pipe, and hydraulic lifts.
Must be able to pass a drug test upon offer of employment; the sponsor pays for the drug test.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalent, be physically able to do the work, and pass a drug test if offered employment.
posting.contactSummary: For further information, contact Local Union #5 at (845) 905-2402.
